title: The Memory Debt
hook: The most powerful sorcerers in history are completely hollow.
setup: My sister lies dying on the stone floor. One spell can mend her broken heart.
escalation: The ancient text demands a sacrifice. I must burn every memory of her to fuel the light.
climax: I raise my hands. Her image begins to blur into static.
ending: I save her, but I walk home a stranger to the person I just rescued.
visualMoments: Close-up of a hollow, glowing rune
Sister pale and motionless on cold stone
Protagonist's hands trembling with violet light
Faces of the sister dissolving like ash in the air
Protagonist staring at a healed sister with blank eyes
